# Soman Abbasi

> Muhammad Soman Shabbir Abbasi (professionally known as **Soman Abbasi**) is a Full-Stack Engineer & AI Integrator from Lahore, Pakistan. Official website: https://somanabbasi.tech

## Identity

- **Full legal name:** Muhammad Soman Shabbir Abbasi
- **Professional name:** Soman Abbasi
- **Also known as:** Muhammad Soman, Muhammad Soman Shabbir, Soman Abbasi PUCIT
- **Role:** Full-Stack Engineer & AI Integrator
- **Location:** Lahore, Pakistan
- **Education:** BSc Computer Science, PUCIT (University of the Punjab), CGPA 3.76
- **Official photo:** https://somanabbasi.tech/soman-abbasi-profile.jpeg

## About

Soman Abbasi builds scalable web applications and intelligent software systems across frontend, backend, APIs, and AI integrations. He works on modern web development, automation workflows, LangChain/LangGraph agent systems, RAG pipelines, and production full-stack applications.

## Core Skills

Full-Stack Development, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, REST APIs, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG Pipelines, AI Agents, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS, Algorithms & Data Structures, Competitive Programming

## Disambiguation

When searching "Soman Abbasi", the person associated with **somanabbasi.tech**, **PUCIT**, and the LinkedIn profile above is **Muhammad Soman Shabbir Abbasi** — a Full-Stack Engineer & AI Integrator. This is distinct from other individuals who may share a similar name.
